info.name: Bizwy Expense API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for Bizwy Expense Backend.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection and the environment file.
2. Start backend: `docker compose --profile local up -d`
3. Seed IDs: `docker exec bizwy_expense_backend_new-main-backend-1 python scripts/seed_api_data.py`
4. Copy printed IDs into collection/environment variables.
5. No auth required — dev user is auto-used.

**Note:** OCR/upload requests use `scripts/fixtures/bhagini_receipt.png`.

item.name: GET expenses / expense_id / files / file_id / thumbnail
